OPERATIONAL_FLOWS_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure the closing flows: the resolution buttons (e.g. Won/Lost), the attributes required at closing time and the events sent to Meta. Assignment rules decide which flow each conversation uses.

API.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not delete the closing flow

CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete {flowName}?
CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this closing flow? Rules using it will fall back to no flow.

FORM.SUBTITLE: Define the closing buttons and what is required when resolving a conversation.

META.LABEL: Send conversions to Meta
META.HELP: Master switch for this flow. When on, each state below can fire a Meta event.

CATEGORY.LABEL: Category
CATEGORY.HELP: Reporting dimension. Sales closings feed the sales funnel; support closings are kept separate and never count as conversions.

USED_BY.TITLE: This flow is used by:
USED_BY.EMPTY: No rule uses this flow yet.

FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Could not save the closing flow

REQUIREMENTS.LABEL: Required attributes to close
REQUIREMENTS.HELP: Attributes the agent must fill before resolving as one of these states.

ASSIGNMENT_RULES.DESCRIPTION: Decides which flow applies to each conversation, by the team — and optionally excluding some of that team's caixas. The most specific matching rule wins.
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.EMPTY: No rules yet. Add at least one (e.g. per team) so conversations get a flow. A conversation that matches no rule simply uses no flow.

FORM.CONDITIONS_INTRO: The teams decide the flow. By default it applies to all caixas of the selected teams — you can leave some out below.
FORM.EXCLUDE_CAIXAS_LABEL: Caixas that should NOT use this flow
FORM.EXCLUDE_CAIXAS_HELP: By default every caixa of the selected teams uses this flow. Check the ones to leave out — new caixas join automatically. (If the team has no caixas linked, all caixas are shown.)

ASSIGNMENT_RULES.SAVE_ERROR: Could not save the assignment rule
ASSIGNMENT_RULES.SPECIFICITY_HELP: The most specific matching rule (the one with more conditions) wins. With no conditions, it applies to any conversation.
